summary: Drop redundant ExcludeDrafts:true in followup and rename misnamed isTrue→isFalse so a single (more restrictive) draft filter remains.
reason: Greptile observed that IsDraft=&false already emits `is_draft = 0`, which subsumes ExcludeDrafts's broader `(is_draft = 0 OR is_draft IS NULL)` clause. Dropping the redundant flag and renaming the misleading local var makes intent legible.
